mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_ticket (ticket_no, title, description, category, priority, status, submitter_id, submitter_name, assignee_id, assignee_name, attachments, resolution, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{ticketNo}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{submitterId}, #{submitterName}, #{assigneeId}, #{assigneeName}, #{attachments, typeHandler=com.dataplatform.common.config.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, #{resolution}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_ticket WHERE submitter_id = #{submitterId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_ticket SET status = #{status}, resolution = #{resolution}, resolved_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_ticket_comment (ticket_id, user_id, user_name, content, internal, create_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{internal}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_ticket_comment WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_ticket WHERE status = #{status}
